title: Living hope; trial of faith; prophets searched
summary_text: Peter to elect strangers—sanctified Spirit obedience sprinkled blood—grace peace multiplied. Born again living hope resurrection Jesus inheritance incorruptible reserved heaven—grieved trials prove faith more precious than gold—salvation ready revealed—searched prophets.
key_points: According to the foreknowledge of God the Father, in sanctification of the Spirit.
to a living hope through the resurrection of Jesus Christ from the dead.
to an inheritance incorruptible, and undefiled, and that doesn’t fade away, reserved in heaven for you.
that the proof of your faith … might be found to result in praise, glory, and honor.
Concerning this salvation, the prophets sought and searched diligently.
evidence_phrases: sanctification of the Spirit
a living hope through the resurrection
an inheritance … reserved in heaven
the proof of your faith
the prophets sought and searched diligently
things which angels desire to look into

title: Living stones; holy priesthood; honorable conduct
summary_text: Put away malice guile hypocrisy—desire milk grow—tasted Lord gracious. Living stones spiritual house holy priesthood offer sacrifices—chosen precious cornerstone—stumble disobedient. Abstain fleshly lusts honorable among Gentiles glorify God visit day.
key_points: As newborn babies, long for the pure milk of the Word.
You also, as living stones, are built up as a spiritual house.
Behold, I lay in Zion a chief cornerstone, chosen, and precious.
But you are a chosen race, a royal priesthood, a holy nation.
having good behavior among the nations, so that they may see your good works.
evidence_phrases: long for the pure milk of the Word
living stones … spiritual house
a chief cornerstone, chosen, and precious
a royal priesthood
abstain from fleshly lusts
having good behavior among the nations

title: Wives husbands; suffering; ready defense
summary_text: Wives subject husbands—holy women adorned gentle quiet spirit; Sarah obeyed Abraham. Husbands dwell according knowledge honor weaker vessel heirs grace. Repay evil blessing inherit blessing—eyes Lord on righteous face against evil-doers. Suffer for good conscience Christ suffered once righteous for unrighteous—baptism saves figure ready answer hope.
key_points: Wives, be in subjection to your own husbands.
whose adorning … let it be the hidden person of the heart.
You husbands, live with your wives according to knowledge.
not returning evil for evil, or insult for insult, but contrariwise, blessing.
Because Christ also suffered for sins once, the righteous for the unrighteous.
always being ready to give a reason for the hope that is in you with humility and fear.
evidence_phrases: Wives, be in subjection
the hidden person of the heart
You husbands, live with your wives
returning … blessing
Christ also suffered for sins once
baptism … saves you
give a reason for the hope

title: Arm yourselves; minister gifts; fiery trial
summary_text: Christ suffered flesh—arm yourselves same mind—cease sin live rest time flesh God’s will. Sound judgment sober prayer love cover multitude sins hospitality gifts stewards. Fiery trial not strange—partake Christ’s sufferings—rejoice glory revealed—if suffer as Christian glorify God—judgment begins house God.
key_points: Since Christ suffered for us in the flesh, arm yourselves also with the same mind.
Above all things be earnest in your love among yourselves, for love covers a multitude of sins.
As each has received a gift, employ it in serving one another.
Don’t be surprised at the fiery trial which has come upon you.
If you are insulted for the name of Christ, you are blessed.
evidence_phrases: arm yourselves also with the same mind
cease from sin
love covers a multitude of sins
employ it in serving one another
the fiery trial
you are blessed, because the Spirit of glory

title: Elders shepherd; humility; resist devil
summary_text: Elders shepherd flock willingly examples—Chief Shepherd appears crown glory. Young submit clothed humility—God resists proud gives grace humble humble under mighty hand—cast cares anxiety—sober vigilant devil prowls resist firm faith—after suffering restore God grace peace.
key_points: Shepherd the flock of God which is among you, exercising the oversight.
When the chief Shepherd is revealed, you will receive the crown of glory.
God resists the proud, but gives grace to the humble.
casting all your worries on him, because he cares for you.
Be sober and self-controlled. Be watchful. Your adversary, the devil, walks around.
But may the God of all grace … perfect, establish, strengthen, and settle you.
evidence_phrases: Shepherd the flock of God
the chief Shepherd
God resists the proud
casting all your worries on him
Your adversary, the devil, walks around
the God of all grace
